Objective: Verify GPIO register default values and masked write-read behavior across a defined list of GPIO register addresses using read/write masks and expected default values.
Steps:
1) Entry point: test_case() in program.c is invoked.
2) Default-value verification (chk_rst_val):
   - Initialize loop index i from 0 to CNT-1 (CNT=49).
   - For each i:
     a. addr = addr_array[i].
     b. If skip_rst_array[i] == 1: continue (skip default-value check for this address).
     c. If read_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: continue (not readable; skip).
     d. data_rd = read_reg(addr).
     e. data = (data_rd & 0xFFFFFFFE) (bit 0 masked off).
     f. If data == default_value_array[i]: PASS for this address; else:
        - def_fail_cnt++.
        - Print: RST : Failed Default value mismatch Addr :0x%x Expected : 0x%x\tRead_data : 0x%x\tDATA : 0x%x".

TestCaseID: - For each pattern j in the list:
ii)  If skip_array[i] == 1: continue (skip writing this address).
iii) If write_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: continue (not writable; skip).
vi)  wr_n = (write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xFFFFFFFF) (bitwise NOT of the write-mask).
viii) If data_rd == exp_val: PASS for this address/pattern; else:
- Print: "Read_write : Failed : Write Read mismatch For Address %x
Notes on timing and waits: no delays/sleeps are executed at runtime; wait_on() is only present in a disabled (#ifdef 0) helper (soft_reset_chk)."
TestCaseName:
- For each address where default check is enabled and readable, the masked read value (bit0 cleared) equals default_value_array[i].
- For each data pattern and address where both write and read are enabled, the read value masked by read_mask equals exp_val computed from the written bits and preserved default bits where writes are not allowed.
Objective: Pass only if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0 leading to finish(0); any mismatch that increments either counter results in finish(1).
PreConditions: Console prints from printf; overall pass/fail via finish() return code.
PassCriteria:
- Requires test_common.h providing read_reg(), write_reg(), finish(), wait_on().
- Requires platform headers: gpio/gpio_def.h, gpio/gpio_offset.h (for address and mask macros).
- Build via local Makefile.
Dependencies:
- Default-value comparison masks off bit 0 (data = data_rd & 0xFFFFFFFE).
- 6 data patterns used: 0xFFFFFFFF, 0xAAAAAAAA, 0x55555555, 0xF5F5F5F5, 0xA5A5A5A5, 0xFFFF0000.
- Skip controls: skip_array[] (skip R/W), skip_rst_array[] (skip reset-value check).
- soft_reset_chk() exists but is disabled with #ifdef 0; defines SOFT_RST_REG_ADDRESS=0x00000000 and SOFT_RST_REG_DATA=0x00000000, not used at runtime.
- Impacted register addresses are drawn from addr_array[] defined in test_define.c (see Impacted Registers list).}
